steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The phrase after the colon — "a well-executed marketing campaign helped to make James Redfield's novel the tenth-best-selling novel of 1996" — shows the blank must name something that a marketing campaign exemplifies.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — practicality: A marketing campaign does not specifically illustrate practicality. ✗
  • Choice B — complexity: Nothing in the passage describes the campaign as complex. ✗
  • Choice C — originality: The passage focuses on commercial success, not creative novelty. ✗
  • Choice D — publicity: Publicity is exactly what a marketing campaign generates, and it directly explains how the novel reached bestseller status. ✓
That is the correct answer.
